ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the research was conducted */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Year or period of publication */,
  "funding_euro" REAL /* Funding amount in euros for the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is hybrid (open access with a fee) */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal in which the article was published */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Exact date of publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "media_coverage" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been covered in media */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Main research areas of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number of the journal */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the journal */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the journal is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the author's contribution to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding in euros */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number associated with the funding */,
  "grant_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding grant */,
  "grant_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funding_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "citing_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication citing the work */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or excerpt from the citing publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_citations_citing_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the department belongs to */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the group belongs to */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the leader of the group */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Main research areas of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_groups_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
